sizes.h1: text-5xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-8xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-black uppercase
sizes.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold uppercase

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid and Asymmetric column layouts. Use 12-column CSS grids where elements span 5 or 7 columns, intentionally leaving 1 column empty for whitespace tension.

components.hero: Asymmetric split. Left side: Massive typography 'KONTHAM JAGAN [newline] MOHAN REDDY'. Right side: The portrait framed in a stark, thin border or raw rectangular crop. Include a small mono paragraph describing the role.
components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Solid primary color for primary actions. Border + transparent background for secondary. Hover states should slide in an arrow or inverse colors.
components.cards_projects: Minimalist. Large image block (no border-radius) with title and tech stack below it. On hover, the image scales slightly. Tech stack shown as mono text comma separated.
components.marquee: Massive outlined typography (`text-transparent stroke-current border-text`) scrolling horizontally. E.g. 'FULL-STACK DEVELOPER • CREATIVE CODER • '
components.testimonials: Editorial quote block. Huge serif quotation marks in `Newsreader`. Clean sans-serif text. Author in mono.
components.skills: Grouped into 3 distinct vertical columns: Frontend, Backend, Tools. List them with clean typography and 1px bottom borders for each item (list style).
components.experience: Minimal timeline. Use a 12-column grid: 3 columns for dates (mono), 9 columns for Role, Company, and description.
components.theme_toggle: A crisp icon button (Sun/Moon) fixed to the header or bottom corner, switching between `.dark` and root styles instantly.

motion.scroll_reveal: Framer Motion: `initial={{ y: 30, opacity: 0 }} whileInView={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }}`
motion.hover_image: Scale up image 1.05 with a 0.6s ease-out transition. Container must have `overflow-hidden`.

testing.data_testid: Apply `data-testid` to all major interactive elements. E.g., `data-testid='theme-toggle'`, `data-testid='hero-cta'`, `data-testid='nav-link-projects'`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind CSS to use the specific font families (heading, body, accent, mono) and color variables defined.
Implement the dark mode toggle using standard Tailwind `dark:` classes or switching a `.dark` class on the root element.
Use standard semantic HTML sections (`header`, `main`, `section`, `footer`) and follow the Awwwards editorial vibe.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn card/rounded styles. Use sharp edges (rounded-none), high contrast 1px borders, and generous padding to achieve the editorial look.
Implement the Marquee using framer-motion or standard CSS keyframes.
Ensure the hero avatar frames the image nicely, potentially with a monochrome filter until hover.
Populate the site with Jagan Mohan Reddy's realistic Full-Stack Developer placeholder data.
Ensure WCAG compliance by checking color contrast, especially for the accent color against backgrounds.
